productDisplayName: Roxy Women Natural Believer Brown Belt
description: A belt is an essential detail to complete your ensemble and this fabulous belt from roxy is made of 50% polyurethane and 50% cotton for optimal style and durability. With a generous, adjustable Fit, wear this fashionable belt around those stylish skinnies!Length at largest setting: 100 cmMade of 50% polyurethane and 50% cotton for durability and styleWoven mat designTang clasp to offer a snug fit and to hold the belt in placeCareUse a brass polisher to maintain buckle shineWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
